exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your hobby project forward
items: Set up a dedicated workspace and acquire the essential tools for your hobby project
Create your first complete project milestone and establish a regular practice schedule
Document your initial attempts and create a progress tracking system for your hobby
Complete your first major project milestone and share it with others for feedback
Establish connections with other hobbyists through local clubs, online communities, or workshops
Develop your unique style or approach by experimenting with three different techniques or methods
